case_title: NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC VS. BRENDA MORROQUIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORROQUIN, BRENDA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 09/29/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORROQUIN, BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
